description: Author failing tests + a minimal stub for the pure RunOutcomePolicy: over a run's recorded decisions[] it decides SuppressesDelivery (true when ANY proceeded-best-guess OR proceeded-unreviewed decision was recorded — the #340 mergeOnSuccess-OFF trigger) and ProceededUnreviewedWaveCount (how many proceeded-unreviewed waves ran — the 'ran with N unreviewed waves' flag + the distinct-exit trigger)
